problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: The key to What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? is Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor — specifically Synaptic plasticity modulation — which would help 200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
